title: Embeddings got sharper, more role-aware, and multimodal
summary:
A catalog-and-embeddings day: clearer model choices, stronger vector search, a publisher path, and infrastructure that tells the truth when the internet does not.

Gemini Embedding 2 now uses its GA multi-region endpoint and documented task instructions, while Cohere gets query/document roles, text-image embedding support arrives, and model-specific dimension and context guidance makes vector search less of a guessing game. Existing Gemini 2 indexes should be re-embedded before mixing old and new vectors.

All 132 model descriptions were rewritten around practical strengths and trade-offs, Sonar's high-context preset was renamed for clarity without breaking existing aliases, and API-key permissions now show only callable canonical models—including active private community models. Less catalog archaeology, fewer retired IDs appearing where they cannot help.

A new GitHub issue form gives prospective community-model publishers a clear path to request account-level public publishing access, linked directly from My Models and the API docs. Private models remain available to register without the allowlist ceremony.
